message:
feat(ingest): Add capture_snapshot method and delta extraction logic

- Add capture_snapshot method to PaneCursor for processing pane snapshots
- Implement delta extraction with overlap detection
- Add hash_text utility for content hashing
- Handle gap detection in capture flow
- Clean up disappeared panes from registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,16 @@ anyhow.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 
+[features]
+default = []
+vendored = ["wa-core/vendored"]
+browser = ["wa-core/browser"]
+mcp = ["wa-core/mcp"]
+web = ["wa-core/web"]
+tui = ["wa-core/tui"]
+metrics = ["wa-core/metrics"]
+distributed = ["wa-core/distributed"]
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 assert_cmd = "2.0"
 predicates = "3.1"
